text: ACME Logistics confirmed payment for invoice INV-1001. There was a typo in the payer name from the bank export.
Blue Ocean Supplies sent a partial payment for PO-8893. Remaining balance will be paid next week.
Delta Tech Services applied a 10 USD early payment discount for invoice INV-1005.
Prime Retail Ops may have accidentally sent the same payment twice for invoice INV-1007. Please verify before closing.
Nova Packaging normally invoices in USD. Any EUR payment should be manually reviewed before reconciliation.
Cedar & Co Consulting split the payment for INV-1013 into two transfers: 2000 USD and 2500 USD against PO-8903.
Atlas Manufacturing pays under the shortened name 'Atlas Mfg' in the bank feed. Match by PO-8904 when in doubt.
Silver Lining Cleaning rarely includes the invoice number; they reference the service month instead. INV-1019 corresponds to May cleaning services.
Coral Bay Hotels overpaid invoice INV-1033 by 100 USD. Finance will issue a credit note on the next cycle.
Sunrise Media is paying INV-1037 in two installments of 1050 USD each (PAY-9040 and PAY-9045).
Blue Ocean Supplies completed the remaining balance for PO-8893 with PAY-9043. Original invoice INV-1003 should now be fully settled.
Grupo Norte appears as both 'Grupo Norte' and 'Grupo Norte SA' in payments. They are the same vendor.
Wire transfer WT-55012 (PAY-9044) from 'Mystery Payer' has no matching invoice yet. Hold for investigation.
Lakeside Catering references events instead of invoice numbers. PAY-9032 corresponds to INV-1029.
Vertex Software Inc has two open invoices (INV-1017 and INV-1030). Confirm the amount before applying each payment.
